按用户设置的软上限，会在下方时长内由客户端统计。不是服务器强制执行的配额。
Product-usage analytics and diagnostic-report uploads. No message content.
产品使用分析和诊断报告上传。不包含消息内容。
Prompts, completions, and your data are never sent to Anthropic. Telemetry covers crash and usage signals only.

Auto-populate the model picker from the provider's model-list endpoint at launch. Turn off if the endpoint isn't reachable from your network, or to use a fixed list. When off, the model list below is required and must use full model IDs (aliases like sonnet/opus are resolved via discovery).
启动时从提供商的模型列表端点自动填充模型选择器。如果你的网络无法访问该端点，或需要使用固定列表，请关闭此项。关闭后，下面的模型列表为必填，且必须使用完整模型 ID（sonnet/opus 等别名会通过发现解析）。

Sent on every inference and model-discovery request (joined into the CLI's `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS`).\n\nUse this for fleet-wide constants. For per-user or per-session values, have the **credential helper script** emit JSON with a `headers` field; those are merged over these static entries (helper wins on conflict).
发送到每个推理和模型发现请求（会合并进 CLI 的 `ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS`）。\n\n用于全员固定常量。对于按用户或按会话变化的值，请让**凭据辅助脚本**输出带有 `headers` 字段的 JSON；这些值会覆盖这里的静态条目（冲突时辅助脚本优先）。

Claude runs the executable with no arguments and reads **stdout** (trimmed). Exit code must be `0`; any output on **stderr** is logged but ignored. **Stdout must contain only one of the formats below** (no banners, prompts, or log lines).

**Output format** is either:
- a single bare token (the API key / bearer token), or
- a JSON object `{"token": "...", "headers": {"Name": "Value", ...}}` when per-request headers are needed (merged over **Custom inference headers**, helper wins on conflict)

Result is cached for the TTL below. On TTL expiry the helper is re-invoked transparently (no user prompt, no relaunch).

**Typical use:** a shell script that pulls from Keychain, 1Password CLI, or an internal secret broker. Example:

`security find-generic-password -s anthropic-api -w`

If this field is set, static credential fields (API key, bearer token) are ignored. The helper always wins.

Claude 会无参数执行该可执行文件，并读取 **stdout**（去除首尾空白）。退出码必须为 `0`；**stderr** 上的任何输出都会被记录但会被忽略。**Stdout 只能包含以下格式之一**（不要有横幅、提示或日志行）。

**输出格式**为：
- 一个裸 token（API 密钥 / bearer token），或
- 一个 JSON 对象 `{"token": "...", "headers": {"Name": "Value", ...}}`，用于需要按请求设置请求头的场景（会覆盖**自定义推理请求头**，冲突时辅助脚本优先）

结果会按下面的 TTL 缓存。TTL 过期后会透明地重新调用辅助脚本（不会提示用户，也无需重启）。

**典型用途：** 从钥匙串、1Password CLI 或内部密钥代理拉取凭据的 shell 脚本。示例：

`security find-generic-password -s anthropic-api -w`

设置此字段后，静态凭据字段（API 密钥、bearer token）会被忽略。辅助脚本始终优先。

message:z?`Archive ${j.items.length} ${1===j.items.length?y.noun:y.nouns}? You can find ${1===j.items.length?"it":"them"} in the Archived tab.`
message:z?`归档 ${j.items.length} 个${1===j.items.length?y.noun:y.nouns}？你可以在“已归档”标签页中找到${1===j.items.length?"它":"它们"}。`

Only affects **tool calls**. Inference and MCP traffic are covered by their own allowlists elsewhere.

When unset, only the inference endpoint is reachable from the sandbox; the agent's package installs (pip/npm) and web fetches will fail with a 403.

Accepts exact hostnames (`api.github.com`), wildcards (`*.corp.com` matches one subdomain level), and `*` to allow all.

Wildcards don't cross schemes. `*.corp.com` matches `docs.corp.com` but not `corp.com` itself; add both if you need the apex.

IP literals and localhost always resolve regardless of this list; this is a public-egress filter, not a sandbox.

Hosts you add here also need to be open on your network firewall. See **Egress Requirements** for the full allowlist.

仅影响**工具调用**。推理和 MCP 流量由各自的允许列表单独控制。

未设置时，沙箱只能访问推理端点；代理的包安装（pip/npm）和网页获取会因 403 失败。

接受精确主机名（`api.github.com`）、通配符（`*.corp.com` 匹配一级子域名）以及用于允许全部的 `*`。

通配符不会跨越层级。`*.corp.com` 匹配 `docs.corp.com`，但不匹配 `corp.com` 本身；如果需要根域，请两者都添加。

IP 字面量和 localhost 始终可解析，不受此列表影响；这是公网出站过滤器，不是沙箱。

你在这里添加的主机还需要在网络防火墙中放行。完整允许列表见**出站要求**。

"Essential" means the signals Anthropic needs to keep your deployment working: **crash stacks**, **startup failure reasons**, and **version/OS metadata**. No prompts, completions, file contents, or identifiers beyond a random install ID.

**What you lose when this is on:** when a Cowork build hits a bug that only reproduces on your OS version or locale, Anthropic can't see it unless a user manually reports. Fixes ship slower.

**Why this is discouraged, not blocked:** some air-gapped environments require zero outbound telemetry as a matter of policy. The switch exists for them. If you don't have that constraint, leave it off.

“必要”指 Anthropic 维持你的部署正常运行所需的信号：**崩溃堆栈**、**启动失败原因**和**版本/OS 元数据**。不包含提示词、补全、文件内容，也不包含随机安装 ID 以外的标识符。

**启用此项会失去什么：** 当 Cowork 构建遇到只在你的 OS 版本或区域设置下复现的 bug 时，除非用户手动报告，否则 Anthropic 无法看到。修复发布会更慢。

**为什么不建议但不阻止：** 一些隔离网络环境因政策要求零出站诊断数据。此开关就是为它们准备的。如果你没有这个约束，请保持关闭。

"Nonessential" covers two things: **product-usage analytics** (which features get used, navigation patterns; no prompts or completions) and the **Send** action in Help → Generate Diagnostic Report. Turning this on stops both.\n\nDestination for both: `claude.ai`. Already listed under Egress Requirements → Nonessential telemetry.

“Nonessential”包括两项：**product-usage analytics**（会使用哪些功能、导航模式；不含提示词或补全）以及 Help → Generate Diagnostic Report 中的 **Send** 操作。开启此项会同时停止两者。\n\n两者的目标地址都是：`claude.ai`。已列在 Egress Requirements → Nonessential telemetry 下。

Point this configuration at a bootstrap URL to have your organization manage these settings remotely.
将此配置指向一个引导 URL，让你的组织远程管理这些设置。
HTTPS endpoint that returns a per-user JSON config overlay. Values from the response override local settings and become read-only.
返回每用户 JSON 配置覆盖层的 HTTPS 端点。响应中的值会覆盖本地设置并变为只读。

message:F?`Archive ${j.items.length} ${1===j.items.length?y.noun:y.nouns}? You can find ${1===j.items.length?"it":"them"} in the Archived tab.`
message:F?`归档 ${j.items.length} 个${1===j.items.length?y.noun:y.nouns}？你可以在“已归档”标签页中找到${1===j.items.length?"它":"它们"}。`
Offer Auto mode in the Cowork and Code permission selectors. Claude decides which actions need approval.
在 Cowork 和 Code 权限选择器中提供 Auto mode。Claude 会决定哪些操作需要批准。
When enabled, users can select Auto mode (Code tab) / Act without asking (Cowork tab). Claude runs a safety classifier on each action and only prompts for approval on actions it judges risky.
启用后，用户可以选择 Auto mode（Code 标签页）/ Act without asking（Cowork 标签页）。Claude 会对每个操作运行安全分类器，并且只在判断为有风险的操作上请求批准。

When enabled, users can select **Auto mode** (Code tab) / **Act without asking** (Cowork tab). Claude runs a safety classifier on each action and only prompts for approval on actions it judges risky.

Requires a model that supports the classifier (Claude 4.6+). Older models show the option greyed out.

This is the permissive opposite of the per-tool `ask` policy above; both may be set.

启用后，用户可以选择 **Auto mode**（Code 标签页）/ **Act without asking**（Cowork 标签页）。Claude 会对每个操作运行安全分类器，并且只在判断为有风险的操作上请求批准。

需要支持该分类器的模型（Claude 4.6+）。较旧模型会将此选项显示为灰色。

这是上方按工具设置的 `ask` 策略的宽松反向选项；两者可以同时设置。
Requires a model that supports the classifier (Claude 4.6+). Older models show the option greyed out.

This is the permissive opposite of the per-tool ask policy above; both may be set.
这是上方按工具设置的 ask 策略的宽松反向选项；两者可以同时设置。

"Nonessential" covers two things: **product-usage analytics** (which features get used, navigation patterns; no prompts or completions) and the **Send** action in Help \u2192 Generate Diagnostic Report. Turning this on stops both.\n\nDestination for both: `claude.ai`. Already listed under Egress Requirements \u2192 Nonessential telemetry.

“Nonessential”包括两项：**product-usage analytics**（会使用哪些功能、导航模式；不含提示词或补全）以及 Help → Generate Diagnostic Report 中的 **Send** 操作。开启此项会同时停止两者。\n\n两者的目标地址都是：`claude.ai`。已列在 Egress Requirements → Nonessential telemetry 下。
